Factory Pack Quantity

Factory Pack Quantity - The package size that is typically shipped from the factory (Note: manufacturers can change the package size without notice.)

Ordering in multiples of the “Factory Pack Quantity” is most efficient for our volume production customers.

In most cases, Mouser will gladly break the “Factory Pack Quantity”. (See Minimum and Multiples to verify ordering requirements)

The country is subject to change at the time of shipment.

DC2645A Eval for LTC5594 I/Q Demodulator

Analog Devices Inc. DC2645A Evaluation Board is designed to evaluate the LTC5594 high linearity I/Q demodulator with wideband IF amplifiers. This DC2645A evaluation board features single-ended RF input, single-ended Local Oscillator (LO) input, and discrete L-C interstage lowpass filters. The DC2645A evaluation board requires USB serial controller, DC590B, to control and configure the LTC5594 amplifier for its evaluation. The discrete L-C interstage lowpass filters between the demodulator outputs and the IF amplifier inputs, limit the DC-coupled differential I and Q outputs to 1GHz. The DC2645A is capable of writing to specific registers through the SPI bus to adjust or optimize LTC5594's amplifier gain, LO input frequency, and linearity.

FEATURED PRODUCTS
ANALOG DEVICES INC.

No Image
ADRF6780 Microwave Upconverters
Based on Silicon Germanium (SiGe) and operate over a wideband frequency range of 5.9GHz to 23.6GHz.
Learn More about ADRF6780 Microwave Upconverters
No Image
EVAL-HMC994APM5 Evaluation Board
A 2-layer PCB fabricated from 10 mil-thick copper-clad, mounted to an aluminum heat spreader.
Learn More about EVAL-HMC994APM5 Evaluation Board
No Image
ADL8120-EVALx Evaluation Boards
4-layer PCBs designed to evaluate the ADL8120 30kHz to 20GHz Low Noise Amplifier.
Learn More about ADL8120-EVALx Evaluation Boards
No Image
EVAL-ADL8124 Evaluation Board
Simplifies the testing and characterization of the ADL8124 dual-channel low noise amplifier (LNA).
Learn More about EVAL-ADL8124 Evaluation Board
No Image
ADRF5050-EVALZ Evaluation Board
Evaluates the features and performance of the ADRF5050, a nonreflective SP4T switch.
Learn More about ADRF5050-EVALZ Evaluation Board

If you encounter further problems, please contact us on 800-346-6873 or email help@mouser.com.

Shipping Instructions

Mouser ships most UPS, FedEx, and DHL orders same day. Global Priority Mail orders ship on the next business day.The following exceptions cause orders to be reviewed before processing. Most exceptions are cleared immediately but some may cause an order to ship one day later.

  • - If you provide any special instructions on your order
  • - New customer orders that require security or address verification
  • - Credit card security concerns
  • - An open account customer with a credit concern
  • - Import restrictions in some countries
  • - Orders exporting from the US due to export regulations
